name: Ace of Wands
short_upright: A bolt of creative energy and the impulse to begin something. Raw potential and inspiration arrive, asking to be channeled into action.
short_reversed: The spark exists but won't catch. Creative blocks, hesitation, or scattered energy stalling what wants to ignite.

name: Two of Wands
short_upright: Standing at the edge of your world, mapping where to go next. The first move has been made and now you weigh the wider horizon with growing confidence.
short_reversed: Plans stall in the planning stage. Fear of leaving familiar ground keeps you rehearsing the same options instead of choosing one.

name: Three of Wands
short_upright: Early efforts begin to bear fruit and the view widens. You watch your ships come in, ready to expand into broader territory.
short_reversed: Anticipated returns are slower than hoped. Setbacks or a too-narrow vision are limiting how far your work can travel.

name: Four of Wands
short_upright: A milestone reached and a moment to gather with those who share your work. Stability and joy arrive together, marking real progress.
short_reversed: The celebration feels strained or postponed. Friction at home or in your community undercuts the sense of arrival you were looking for.

name: Five of Wands
short_upright: Clashing wills and competing voices crowd the room. The friction is real but often productive, sharpening ideas through honest disagreement.
short_reversed: The fight winds down or moves inward. Tensions cool through compromise, or get suppressed and simmer beneath the surface.

name: Six of Wands
short_upright: Effort pays off in visible, public success. Others see what you have built and the recognition fuels well-earned confidence.
short_reversed: Acknowledgment fails to land or curdles into ego. Either the win goes unseen, or the spotlight breeds arrogance that weakens what comes next.

name: Seven of Wands
short_upright: Holding the high ground against pressure from below. Your position is challenged and the work now is to defend it with steady conviction.
short_reversed: The challenges are mounting faster than you can answer them. Doubt creeps in and the urge to drop the fight starts to feel reasonable.

name: Eight of Wands
short_upright: Things move quickly after a long pause. News, decisions, and opportunities arrive in rapid succession, asking you to keep pace.
short_reversed: Momentum stalls and signals get crossed. Plans drag, messages misfire, and the rhythm you were counting on falls out of step.

name: Nine of Wands
short_upright: Bruised but still standing, with one more push left in you. Past battles have made you wary, yet that hard-won experience is exactly what carries you through.
short_reversed: Defenses have hardened into walls. Exhaustion and mistrust make every new ask feel like an attack, even from people trying to help.

name: Ten of Wands
short_upright: Carrying more than any one person should. The work is real and meaningful, but the load has grown heavy enough to obscure why you started.
short_reversed: The weight finally comes off, by choice or by collapse. What you set down clears space, even if letting go feels like loss at first.

name: Page of Wands
short_upright: A young, eager spark with more curiosity than caution. New interests catch fire quickly, inviting you to chase them with a beginner's openness.
short_reversed: The enthusiasm is there but won't focus. Ideas multiply faster than they're acted on, and projects start without ever quite landing.

name: Knight of Wands
short_upright: All forward motion, fueled by passion and a love of the chase. Bold moves and big gestures push the situation into new territory fast.
short_reversed: The same fire turns reckless or burns out. Charging without a plan creates wreckage, or the engine stalls before it ever leaves the driveway.

name: Queen of Wands
short_upright: Warm, magnetic, and entirely at home in her own power. She leads by presence rather than force, drawing others in through confidence and creative heat.
short_reversed: That confidence wavers or curdles. Insecurity shows up as jealousy or control, and the easy charisma gets harder to access from the inside.

name: King of Wands
short_upright: A visionary leader who turns big ideas into committed direction. Authority sits naturally on him because he's willing to back his vision with action.
short_reversed: Vision without discipline becomes ego. Decisions get made too fast, dissent gets dismissed, and leadership tips into bluster or domination.
